title: Fix logo not displaying in navbar and footer

requirements.summary: Fix logo display across all components by saving the logo as a static asset and updating all image references to use the correct path with proper sizing and object-fit settings
acceptanceCriteria: The logo image file exists at frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png
The Growth Byte Digital logo is visible in the Navbar at approximately 48px height on both desktop and mobile
The logo is visible in the Footer alongside the agency name text
The logo is visible in the HeroSection
The logo is visible in the AboutSection with glow effect intact
No broken image icons appear anywhere on the page
The logo is not cropped or distorted — it uses object-fit contain

file_operations.description: Save the generated Growth Byte Digital logo image (converted from WhatsApp Image 2026-02-15 at 12.15.01 AM.jpeg with transparent background and optimized for web at 512x512 dimensions) as a static asset that will be referenced by all components

Update the logo element to use src='/assets/generated/logo.dim_512x512.png', set alt='Growth Byte Digital', add explicit height constraint of 48px (with auto width to maintain aspect ratio), and set object-fit to 'contain' to prevent cropping or distortion

Update the logo element to use src='/assets/generated/logo.dim_512x512.png', set alt='Growth Byte Digital', add explicit height constraint of 60px (with auto width to maintain aspect ratio), and set object-fit to 'contain' to ensure the logo displays correctly alongside the agency name text

Update the logo element to use src='/assets/generated/logo.dim_512x512.png', set alt='Growth Byte Digital', add explicit width and height constraints appropriate for the hero display size (larger than navbar/footer), and set object-fit to 'contain' to preserve logo proportions on the full-screen hero background

Update the logo element to use src='/assets/generated/logo.dim_512x512.png', set alt='Growth Byte Digital', add explicit width and height constraints appropriate for the about section display, set object-fit to 'contain', and ensure the existing glow effect styling remains intact
